title: L3a-parse — NL-boundary leg, family/world vertical: deterministic mapper-a1-hybrid parse of blind held-out NL phrasings of the frozen l3a eval vs the measured gold-parse ceiling, engine re-verified behaviourally parent-perfect in-run by gate G2 (HL3a clause 2)

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_exact
dependent_vars.definition: covered NL phrasings whose front-end parse the engine answers with status=answer, value equal to the pre-authored expected value, provenance ids all present in the world store, non-empty axiom license (scored exactly as the frozen parent l3a)

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_refused
dependent_vars.definition: covered phrasings refused at any stage (ERR_PARSE with stage tag, or engine ERR_*) — the SAFE half of the fail-closed split; reported by stage

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_answered_wrong
dependent_vars.definition: covered phrasings answered with a value != expected (mis-parse converted into a confident wrong answer) — the DANGEROUS half, gated (S2)

dependent_vars.name: n_control_refused_acceptable
dependent_vars.definition: included control phrasings (malformed stratum excluded, FK-NLB-5) refused with the pre-authored expected engine ERR_* code OR ERR_PARSE (FK-NLB-6); strict engine-code match reported descriptively

dependent_vars.name: n_control_answered
dependent_vars.definition: included control phrasings answered at all (fail-closed breach on the control slice)

dependent_vars.name: dev_abstention_rate
dependent_vars.definition: front-end parse-failure rate on the 60-item DEV phrasing set (instrument gate G4, bound 0.20)

dependent_vars.name: frontend_total_ns
dependent_vars.definition: wall-clock for one full mapper-parse pass on the pinned r0 box (descriptive)

n_planned.scope: HL3a CLAUSE-2 NL-PARSE LEG ONLY, family/world vertical. Frozen parent eval reused byte-identically: 600 covered + 270 control (parent's 300 minus the 30-item malformed stratum, excluded by FK-NLB-5 as having no faithful NL rendering). One blind held-out NL phrasing per included query (K=1, FK-NLB-4) + 60 DEV phrasings over FRESH minted identities disjoint from every scored item (ASM-0145), authored under the design doc section-5 blind protocol, + a 60-item no-label synonym PROBE (descriptive only, never gated, FK-NLB-8/ASM-0144). No model, no GPU, no LLM/RAG arm, no cost claim.
n_planned.shape_recoverable_note: FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420 (design doc 14.2): the recoverability audit MEASURED that unmarked English cannot faithfully render the unique-maker and made-lookup shapes (0.7167 strict recovery; the 8/8 genuine shape misses fall in exactly those two families). The gated primary and S2 numerators are therefore scored over the 7 shape-recoverable IN-SCOPE families only (n_covered_scored=527), as per-family bucket sums over the score_nl by_family enrichment (ASM-0480). All 600 covered phrasings still execute; the 2 dropped families are reported descriptively in /analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum, never gated, carved out of the envelope. Precedent FK-NLB-5 (malformed excluded as having no faithful NL rendering); here the absence of a shape-faithful rendering is MEASURED, not a priori.
n_planned.seed_note: front-end and engine are RNG-free; seed 0 pins the deranged-lexicon arm's fixed-point-free permutation only
n_planned.successors: on PASS: the NL leg may be included in l3a-cost RESTRICTED to the 7-family shape-recoverable slice (n=527, FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420, design doc 14.2/14.8 item 2): l3a-cost MUST exclude the quarantined unique-maker/made-lookup shapes from any inherited NL claim, or re-measure them under a successor design (marked-English phrasings or answer-shape-equivalence scoring, new record id); the measured partial-negative for the dropped shapes travels with the result. on FAIL: parser-stage successor (deterministic-frontend v1 or LLM-assisted parse under FK-NLB-3), never more GPU (kill text)

arms_mandatory_baselines: gold-replication (measured-ceiling arm: parent's gold queries on the engine that ACTUALLY RUNS — NOT byte-identical to the parent-frozen pin, design doc 10.9; must reproduce the parent-perfect 600/600 + 300/300 in-run — instrument gate G2, which IS this record's engine-continuity claim, ASM-0147)

deranged-lexicon (scramble control, R0 analog of shuffled-kernel: seed-pinned fixed-point-free permutation of the front-end's concept-URN targets; retained exactness must collapse < 0.10 — instrument gate G5, else the eval is answerable without correct concept binding)
abstain-all + answer-all (trivial-policy brackets as in the frozen parent). Kernel-as-text null NOT instantiable at R0 (no model consumes anything) — same registered adaptation as the frozen parents.

endpoints.test: mapper-parse covered-exact rate over the 527 shape-recoverable IN-SCOPE covered queries (7 families; FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420 re-scope — the run executes all 600 covered phrasings but the 2 shape-ambiguous families unique-maker/made-lookup are descriptive-only, /analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum), scored as a bucket sum over the score_nl by_family enrichment (ASM-0480), one-sided Wilson 95% LB (z=1.645, kot_common formula) vs floor 0.90. Retained-fraction form is identical to absolute rate because the gold ceiling is MEASURED at 600/600 (registry/verdicts/l3a.json; 527/527 on the in-scope slice) — non-inferiority margin 0.10 vs measured ceiling 1.0; F2 degenerate-denominator lesson discharged by construction. Floor = ceiling minus the pre-declared 10% maximum NL-boundary loss instantiating the HL3a clause-2 'pre-declared fraction' (ASM-0141). Decision boundaries (design doc 14.2, recomputed): PASS needs >=486/527 (LB 0.9008), FAIL fires <=462/527 (UB 0.8983); planning value 0.95 (LB 0.9320).

Holm family member 1 of 2 (family alpha 0.05, one-sided): included-control acceptable-refusal rate (expected engine code OR ERR_PARSE; FK-NLB-6) vs gate 0.95 over n=270. Planning value 0.99 (Holm-worst z=1.96 LB 0.9695). Strict engine-code rate and refused-any reported descriptively.

Holm family member 2 of 2: covered mis-parse->wrong-answer rate over the 527 shape-recoverable IN-SCOPE covered queries (bucket sum over score_nl by_family, FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0480 — the shape-ambiguous families' outcomes never enter this numerator, the manufactured-kill pathway design doc 14.1 preempts), one-sided Wilson UB vs gate 0.02 (the dangerous half of the fail-closed split; the safe half — mis-parse->refusal — is the primary's complement, reported by stage). Gate passes <=4/527 (UB 0.0194 at z=1.96); planning value 3/527 (UB 0.0166 at z=1.96). Independent kill leg: unadjusted Wilson LB >= 0.02 is a FAIL rule (fires from 16/527, LB 0.0203 at z=1.645). WILSON_GATE DECLARATION NOTE (design doc 14.8 item 7): the gate block is declared in complement form (expected_rate 0.995, threshold 0.98) because the RT-4 constraint-9 checker powers LB-exceeds-threshold gates only; by the Wilson complement identity LB(1-p,n,z) == 1-UB(p,n,z) this is the IDENTICAL gate — the tested quantity remains the wrong-answer rate UB < 0.02 with unchanged boundaries.

descriptive, no threshold: ERR_PARSE distribution over {gazetteer-miss, mapper-abstain, frame-miss, frame-ambiguous} + label-verbatim vs paraphrase exactness stratification — the stage-indictment instrument (architecture-ladder section 8 item 14) a FAIL must cite. The 60-item no-label synonym probe (/analysis/synonym_probe) is reported alongside, descriptive ONLY, never gated, carved out of the envelope (FK-NLB-8/ASM-0144).
descriptive: mean front-end+engine microseconds per phrasing on the pinned r0 box; no cost-ratio claim is tested in this record (successor l3a-cost).

kill_criterion_verbatim: HL3a clause 2 (architecture-ladder.md section 5.1, frozen verbatim in registry/experiments/l3a.json): 'mapper-parse loses > a pre-declared fraction of gold-parse accuracy (the NL boundary eats the rung; L3 waits for a better parser, not more GPU)'. THIS RECORD instantiates the pre-declared fraction at 10% absolute: FAIL iff the mapper-parse covered-exact one-sided Wilson 95% UB <= 0.90, OR the covered wrong-answer one-sided Wilson 95% LB >= 0.02 (fail-closed demonstrably broken — a mis-parse that answers wrongly with provenance attached is worse than any refusal). Either FAIL routes investment to the parser stage named by the stage-breakdown, never to GPU. Clause 3 (LLM/RAG cost differentiator) belongs to l3a-cost and cannot be decided here.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Measured range: R0 — no host model; ONE deterministic front-end build (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838…, one entity gazetteer, one frozen frame rule set), ONE blind agent-authored held-out phrasing set (K=1 per query, design-doc section-5 protocol), the parents' frozen eval/stores byte-identical, and the engine behaviourally parent-perfect on the parent eval, re-verified IN-RUN by gate G2 (the engine sha differs from the parent-frozen pin — design doc 10.9 / 14.8 item 8, ASM-0147; no byte-identity is claimed). A PASS licenses only: the 7-FAMILY SHAPE-RECOVERABLE SLICE of the closed kot-query/1 grammar (n=527; FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420, design doc 14.2) is reachable from THESE held-out NL phrasings by a deterministic training-free front-end with <=10% covered-exactness loss and an intact fail-closed contract, on the family/world vertical — the gate needed for an honest NL leg in l3a-cost, inherited by l3a-cost ONLY at the same 7-family slice with the unique-maker/made-lookup exclusion restated. It licenses NOTHING about the two shape-ambiguous families (unique-maker 43, made-lookup 30): those 73 items are carried as a MEASURED partial-negative (/analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum, descriptive only), not silence, and NO whole-closed-grammar reachability claim survives this record. It licenses NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim, NO other phrasing distribution/corpus/domain/language, NO paraphrase-set-size scaling, NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost claim, NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model, and NO cross-vertical conjunction (a5-nl licenses the code vertical separately). A FAIL indicts the named front-end stage and licenses exactly the kill's routing: parser investment, not GPU.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

scoring/parse behaviour byte-unchanged — the envelope wraps the same metrics; supersedes 3d92e1ab… and the pre-EVAL pin 426722aa…), nlb_lint.py 63927281f67007c8406f4ec0369350996be99791522fe8dd6b5947ab54aeeb30 (14.4 masked forced-substring rule + waived_forced_substring receipt, ASM-0423, PLUS the 14.8 item-11 fail-closed --arms-profile guard: DEFAULT model profile blocks green on a nonempty waived list, deterministic-r0 is the pinned attestation for this non-model record and the committed receipts regenerate byte-identically under it, ASM-0621; mapper package kernel-mapper with a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838… verified at import; SHARED HARNESS byte-identical with a5-nl (FK-NLB-1); ANALYSIS PIN PROVENANCE (kot-reg/1 keeps pins.analysis_script to path/sha256/output_fields, so the provenance note lives here): analysis/l3a_parse.py sha256 d6b3e65e6206cd781713f54c529c4b70bf6e72141e741704011f341a80901ce6 re-pinned 2026-07-10 at the independent-skeptic ROUND-3 remediation (design doc 14.10, ASM-0625, on top of the 14.9 round-2-re-audit hardening, ASM-0624): carries the FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420 shape-recoverable re-scope (gated primary + S2 numerators as bucket sums over the 7 in-scope families, n_scored=527, via the ASM-0480 score_nl by_family enrichment; /analysis/n_covered_run + /analysis/n_covered_scored replace /analysis/n_covered; descriptive /analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum + /analysis/audit_r1_ref), EXPECTED_PHRASINGS_SHA256 = eval.jsonl sha256 832828d8…, the round-2 fail-closed gates (G7 executable harness-pin enforcement of THIS manifest + the corpus pins on every arm body; G1 counts-integrity: run-level covered + control partitions, family-key set equality, per-family bucket partition, twins, control-zero, non-negative-integer buckets; G5 deranged-arm existence), AND the 14.9 re-audit hardening: G0 one-row-per-arm re-based on the EXECUTABLE kot-log/1 run-row supersedes channel (row identity = sha256 of the replaced log line's exact bytes incl. newline, the prev_sha256/reuse.row_hashes identity; log-append enforces at append time, G0 re-verifies independently: distinct 64-hex list typing, same-arm, non-self, no dangling, no cross-arm, no byte-duplicate rows, string config.arm required, PLUS the 14.10 item-A completion (ASM-0625) making the two enforcement layers genuinely independent: a non-blank string reason required on every superseding row and no target retired twice (the order-free form of log-append's not-already-superseded rule) — the FULL order-independently-checkable append-time semantics; target event/exit/phase stay TRANSITIVELY enforced (verdict-gen's eligibility filter drops non-run/non-final/non-ok rows before the scorer, leaving any reference to them dangling and G0-invalid), a registered reliance, not an omission — verdict-gen passes eligible rows unchanged and the scorer is the resolution point), G1 extended with control-family acceptable sums == run-level acceptable total and strict integer typing of n_covered/n_control/dev_n/dev_parse_refused (dev_parse_refused <= dev_n), typed G2 gold counters, hardened G4 in-range division, AND the 14.10 item-B short-circuit (ASM-0625): any g1_counts failure returns a clean serializable INSTRUMENT-INVALID (gates populated, analysis block EMPTY, exit 0) BEFORE any Wilson/Holm/descriptive arithmetic, so no rejected denominator is ever computed over and malformed counts always reach the registered INSTRUMENT-INVALID verdict, never ERR_P2_ANALYSIS; G1 additionally types every remaining analysis-divided counter (label_strata, synonym-probe counters, frontend_total_ns when present) and non-dict metrics/pins_observed bodies fail closed instead of raising. Supersedes 6954ab92… (round-2-re-audit pin), 8799741f… (round-2 pin), 7d1aa9ef… (round-1 re-scope pin) and bc96c626… (freeze-candidate pin).

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN of the trivial-policy cells (abstain-all / answer-all, R0) that the parents' results logs already hold at mechanically indeterminate pins (producers a5, a5-llm, l3a): reuse-permission is DEFERRED programme-wide (resource-optimization-plan.md section 3 interlock, ERR_P2_REUSE_UNRATIFIED), and the logged rows could not serve as this record's arm outputs even in principle - in this record the trivial policies run over the held-out NL PHRASINGS through the pinned front-end (answer-all parses each phrasing, then fabricates deterministically where the pipeline would refuse; abstain-all refuses each PHRASING), whereas every logged parent row ran over gold STRUCTURED queries with no NL front-end in the loop; the cells are $0 deterministic CPU work re-executed fresh under this record's G0/G6/G7 gates (design doc 14.8 item 7)
